name: libspreadsheet-parseexcel-perl
title: libspreadsheet-parseexcel-perl
summary: Perl module to access information from Excel Spreadsheets
description:
Perl module to access information from Excel Spreadsheets
Spreadsheet::ParseExcel is a Perl module allows one to extract information
from Excel spreadsheets. It can be used to read information from an Excel
95-2003 file. It cannot read information in the new XML-based XLSX format,
for that, see Spreadsheet::XLSX (libspreadsheet-xlsx-perl) instead.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libspreadsheet-parseexcel-perl because Perl module to access information from Excel Spreadsheets.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libspreadsheet-parseexcel-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libspreadsheet-parseexcel-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libspreadsheet-parseexcel-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
